description:
Really American Host Kenny Hesse breaks down MAGA Calling BULLSH*T On Thomas Massie's GOP Primary Loss to Ed Gallrein, and ACCUSING DONALD TRUMP of AIPAC Due To Massive Anomolies in Voter Data.

We're not usually ones to give credence to MAGA Election Fraud Conspiracies, but this entire saga is INSANE!
